listings.title: Pearl acrylic 6 piece Complete Drum Kit
listings.body: Pearl Acrylic Complete Drum Kit Cymbals and hardware Everything in pictures included Set never left the house Spotless and in immaculate condition Drums: 22 inch Bass drum 10/12 Rack toms 14/16 Floor toms Tama SLP Mirage 14x6.5 snare I paid over $550 for snare alone koi New Sabian XSR Cymbals 20 inch ride cymbal 18/16/14 inch crash cymbals 10 inch Splash Cymbal 14 inch High hat cymbals All new Pearl heavy duty hardware Pearl seat Pearl Bass drum pedal All new Evans EC2 heads on toms Evans reverse dot snare head EMAD2 Bass drum head Kit looks and sounds incredible Pick up in Clifton NJ 07013 Have close to 5k in it $2800 obo

listings.title: (2pc) German Crystal Decanter with Sterling Collar and Etched Glass Pi
listings.body: The lot includes a cut crystal decanter and a glass pitcher, both featuring sterling silver mounts. The decanter displays geometric diamond and step-cut patterns with a radial starburst base and a faceted stopper. The sterling silver collar on the decanter is marked "925" and "Made in Germany." The pitcher is decorated with etched starburst motifs and sits on a weighted sterling silver base. - h. 13 x dia. 6 in. (Decanter) Included in an online estate sale ending on Monday, June 22 starting at 8:18PM. Local pickup in Purchase, NY on 6/25. View the details and everything in the sale here: https://auctions.aces.net/auction/DLW-98diMio0bCZPK9Jkhg/lot/7EJZ5Lbq-QJoz6iXBDERdw/GERMAN-CRYSTAL-DECANTER-WITH-STERLING-COLLAR-AND-ETCHED-GLASS-PITCHER-WITH-STERLING-BASE

listings.body: untitled Molded crystal on wood base h. 11 x w. 3.5 in. The sculpture depicts two profile faces in relief centered by a heart and celestial motifs, mounted to a square black wood pedestal. listings.title: Iittala (Finnish) Signed Art Glass Low Bowl
listings.body: This circular art glass bowl measures 12.75 inches in diameter and features a frosted white center surrounded by a transparent clear rim. The underside is etched with the signature 'IITTALA-1988' along the circular foot. The piece is designed with a shallow, low-profile silhouette and a smooth, polished finish. It rests on an integrated, short clear glass base. - dia. 12.75 in. Included in an online estate sale ending on Monday, June 22 starting at 8:18PM. Local pickup in Purchase, NY on 6/25. View the details and everything in the sale here: https://auctions.aces.net/auction/DLW-98diMio0bCZPK9Jkhg/lot/KwDbkADo_ntAvBUo5qE1Fg/IITTALA-FINNISH-SIGNED-ART-GLASS-LOW-BOWL

listings.title: Manuel Felguerez (Mexican, 1928-2020) Ceramic Sculpture
listings.body: untitled (Seated Figural Sculpture) Hand-painted ceramic h. 16 x l. 10 x d. 8 in. The seated figure is depicted in a cross-legged position with hands raised, featuring a dark ground decorated with red and ochre geometric patterns. A strand of dark beads is draped around the neck of the stylized, bulbous head. The surface is incised and painted with diamond, circle, and linear motifs. It is signed "Felguerez" on the lower rear side near the base. Dimensions: h. 16 x l. 10 x d. 8 in Included in an online estate sale ending on Monday, June 22 starting at 8:18PM. Local pickup in Purchase, NY on 6/25. View the details and everything in the sale here: https://auctions.aces.net/auction/DLW-98diMio0bCZPK9Jkhg/lot/n6ijES2RHHU3-E4Ys9PzlQ/MANUEL-FELGUREZ-MEXICAN-1928-2020-CERAMIC-SCULPTURE

listings.title: Stark Carpet Oversize Oushak Style Wool Area Rug
listings.body: This hand-knotted wool area rug features an all-over Oushak-style pattern on a light taupe ground. Large-scale stylized floral palmettes and botanical motifs are rendered in a muted palette of sage green, terracotta, and ochre. The rug is framed by a coordinating wide border and finished with a cream-colored fringe at two ends. A manufacturer label for Stark Carpet is affixed to the underside corner. - w. 19 x l. 20.3 ft. Included in an online estate sale ending on Monday, June 22 starting at 8:18PM. Local pickup in Purchase, NY on 6/25. View the details and everything in the sale here: https://auctions.aces.net/auction/DLW-98diMio0bCZPK9Jkhg/lot/pQVSWX_GFMYtm1nOnek2tw/STARK-CARPET-OVERSIZE-OUSHAK-STYLE-WOOL-AREA-RUG
